name: EUR Query
query:
SELECT
    q.konto            AS "Konto:Link/Account",
    q.konto_name       AS "Kontoname:Data",
    CASE
        WHEN acc.root_type = 'Income' THEN 'Einnahmen'
        WHEN acc.root_type = 'Expense' AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM `tabAccount` grp
            WHERE grp.company = acc.company
              AND grp.is_group = 1
              AND grp.account_name = 'Umlagefähig'
              AND acc.lft BETWEEN grp.lft AND grp.rgt
        ) THEN 'Umlagefähig'
        WHEN acc.root_type = 'Expense' THEN 'Nicht umlagefähig'
        ELSE acc.root_type
    END               AS "Kategorie:Data",
    SUM(q.betrag)      AS "Betrag (cash):Currency/EUR"
FROM (

    /* A) DIREKTE GL-ZUORDNUNG: Beleg enthält Bank/Kasse-Konto + P&L */
    SELECT
        gle.account                             AS konto,
        acc.account_name                        AS konto_name,
        /* P&L-Logik: Income positiv, Expense negativ */
        SUM(gle.credit - gle.debit)             AS betrag
    FROM `tabGL Entry` gle
    JOIN `tabAccount` acc ON acc.name = gle.account
    WHERE gle.docstatus = 1
      AND gle.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      AND acc.is_group = 0
      AND acc.root_type IN ('Expense','Income')
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM `tabGL Entry` g2
          WHERE g2.voucher_no = gle.voucher_no
            AND g2.voucher_type = gle.voucher_type
            AND g2.account     = %(account)s
            AND g2.docstatus   = 1
            AND g2.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      )
    GROUP BY gle.account, acc.account_name

    UNION ALL

    /* B1) PAYMENT ENTRY -> PURCHASE INVOICE (Ausgaben = negativ) */
    SELECT
        pii.expense_account                     AS konto,
        acc.account_name                        AS konto_name,
        -SUM(
            per.allocated_amount * pii.base_amount
            / NULLIF(pi.base_grand_total, 0)
        )                                       AS betrag
    FROM `tabPayment Entry` pe
    JOIN `tabPayment Entry Reference` per
         ON per.parent = pe.name
        AND per.reference_doctype = 'Purchase Invoice'
    JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
         ON pi.name = per.reference_name
    JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii
         ON pii.parent = pi.name
    JOIN `tabAccount` acc
         ON acc.name = pii.expense_account
    WHERE pe.docstatus = 1
      AND pe.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      /* Nur PE, deren GL das angegebene Konto enthält */
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM `tabGL Entry` g2
          WHERE g2.voucher_no = pe.name
            AND g2.voucher_type = 'Payment Entry'
            AND g2.account     = %(account)s
            AND g2.docstatus   = 1
            AND g2.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      )
    GROUP BY pii.expense_account, acc.account_name

    UNION ALL

    /* B2) PAYMENT ENTRY -> SALES INVOICE (Einnahmen = positiv) */
    SELECT
        sii.income_account                      AS konto,
        acc.account_name                        AS konto_name,
        SUM(
            per.allocated_amount * sii.base_amount
            / NULLIF(si.base_grand_total, 0)
        )                                       AS betrag
    FROM `tabPayment Entry` pe
    JOIN `tabPayment Entry Reference` per
         ON per.parent = pe.name
        AND per.reference_doctype = 'Sales Invoice'
    JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si
         ON si.name = per.reference_name
    JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii
         ON sii.parent = si.name
    JOIN `tabAccount` acc
         ON acc.name = sii.income_account
    WHERE pe.docstatus = 1
      AND pe.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM `tabGL Entry` g2
          WHERE g2.voucher_no = pe.name
            AND g2.voucher_type = 'Payment Entry'
            AND g2.account     = %(account)s
            AND g2.docstatus   = 1
            AND g2.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      )
    GROUP BY sii.income_account, acc.account_name

    UNION ALL

    /* C1) JOURNAL ENTRY -> PURCHASE INVOICE (Ausgaben = negativ, wenn nur Kreditoren ausgeglichen werden) */
    SELECT
        pii.expense_account                     AS konto,
        acc.account_name                        AS konto_name,
        -SUM(
            (gle.debit - gle.credit) * pii.base_amount
            / NULLIF(pi.base_grand_total, 0)
        )                                       AS betrag
    FROM `tabGL Entry` gle
    JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
         ON pi.name = gle.against_voucher
    JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii
         ON pii.parent = pi.name
    JOIN `tabAccount` acc
         ON acc.name = pii.expense_account
    WHERE gle.docstatus = 1
      AND gle.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      AND gle.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
      AND gle.against_voucher_type = 'Purchase Invoice'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM `tabGL Entry` g2
          WHERE g2.voucher_no = gle.voucher_no
            AND g2.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
            AND g2.account     = %(account)s
            AND g2.docstatus   = 1
            AND g2.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      )
    GROUP BY pii.expense_account, acc.account_name

    UNION ALL

    /* C2) JOURNAL ENTRY -> SALES INVOICE (Einnahmen = positiv, wenn nur Debitoren ausgeglichen werden) */
    SELECT
        sii.income_account                      AS konto,
        acc.account_name                        AS konto_name,
        SUM(
            (gle.credit - gle.debit) * sii.base_amount
            / NULLIF(si.base_grand_total, 0)
        )                                       AS betrag
    FROM `tabGL Entry` gle
    JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si
         ON si.name = gle.against_voucher
    JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii
         ON sii.parent = si.name
    JOIN `tabAccount` acc
         ON acc.name = sii.income_account
    WHERE gle.docstatus = 1
      AND gle.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      AND gle.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
      AND gle.against_voucher_type = 'Sales Invoice'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM `tabGL Entry` g2
          WHERE g2.voucher_no = gle.voucher_no
            AND g2.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
            AND g2.account     = %(account)s
            AND g2.docstatus   = 1
            AND g2.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      )
    GROUP BY sii.income_account, acc.account_name



    UNION ALL

    /* D) BANK-JE (Debitorenzahlung) -> Abgrenzungs-JEs im selben Monat (Cash-Basis) */
    SELECT
        pl.account AS konto,
        acc_pl.account_name AS konto_name,
        SUM(paid.paid_amount * pl.pl_amount / NULLIF(month_tot.month_total, 0)) AS betrag
    FROM (
        /* Zahlung: JE mit Bankkonto + Debitorenkonto (Receivable) */
        SELECT
            g.voucher_no AS payment_voucher,
            g.posting_date AS payment_date,
            g.account AS receivable_account,
            (g.credit - g.debit) AS paid_amount
        FROM `tabGL Entry` g
        JOIN `tabAccount` a
             ON a.name = g.account
            AND a.account_type = 'Receivable'
        WHERE g.docstatus = 1
          AND g.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
          AND g.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
          AND (g.credit - g.debit) > 0
          AND EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM `tabGL Entry` b
              WHERE b.docstatus = 1
                AND b.voucher_type = g.voucher_type
                AND b.voucher_no = g.voucher_no
                AND b.account = %(account)s
                AND b.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
          )
    ) AS paid
    JOIN (
        /* Abgrenzung: JE ohne Bankkonto, aber mit Debitor-DEBIT im selben Monat */
        SELECT
            g.voucher_no AS accrual_voucher,
            g.account AS receivable_account,
            DATE_FORMAT(g.posting_date, '%%Y-%%m') AS ym
        FROM `tabGL Entry` g
        JOIN `tabAccount` a
             ON a.name = g.account
            AND a.account_type = 'Receivable'
        WHERE g.docstatus = 1
          AND g.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
          AND g.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
          AND (g.debit - g.credit) > 0
          AND NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM `tabGL Entry` bb
              WHERE bb.docstatus = 1
                AND bb.voucher_type = g.voucher_type
                AND bb.voucher_no = g.voucher_no
                AND bb.account = %(account)s
          )
        GROUP BY g.voucher_no, g.account, DATE_FORMAT(g.posting_date, '%%Y-%%m')
    ) AS accrual
      ON accrual.receivable_account = paid.receivable_account
     AND accrual.ym = DATE_FORMAT(paid.payment_date, '%%Y-%%m')
    JOIN (
        /* P&L-Anteil je Abgrenzungs-JE */
        SELECT
            gle.voucher_no AS accrual_voucher,
            gle.account,
            SUM(gle.credit - gle.debit) AS pl_amount
        FROM `tabGL Entry` gle
        JOIN `tabAccount` acc ON acc.name = gle.account
        WHERE gle.docstatus = 1
          AND gle.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
          AND gle.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
          AND acc.is_group = 0
          AND acc.root_type IN ('Income', 'Expense')
        GROUP BY gle.voucher_no, gle.account
    ) AS pl
      ON pl.accrual_voucher = accrual.accrual_voucher
    JOIN (
        /* Monatssumme je Debitorenkonto (Summe P&L = Debitor-DEBIT in Abgrenzung) */
        SELECT
            g.account AS receivable_account,
            DATE_FORMAT(g.posting_date, '%%Y-%%m') AS ym,
            SUM(v.pl_total) AS month_total
        FROM (
            SELECT
                g.voucher_no,
                g.account,
                g.posting_date
            FROM `tabGL Entry` g
            JOIN `tabAccount` a
                 ON a.name = g.account
                AND a.account_type = 'Receivable'
            WHERE g.docstatus = 1
              AND g.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
              AND g.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
              AND (g.debit - g.credit) > 0
              AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM `tabGL Entry` bb
                  WHERE bb.docstatus = 1
                    AND bb.voucher_type = g.voucher_type
                    AND bb.voucher_no = g.voucher_no
                    AND bb.account = %(account)s
              )
            GROUP BY g.voucher_no, g.account, g.posting_date
        ) g
        JOIN (
            SELECT
                gle.voucher_no,
                SUM(gle.credit - gle.debit) AS pl_total
            FROM `tabGL Entry` gle
            JOIN `tabAccount` acc ON acc.name = gle.account
            WHERE gle.docstatus = 1
              AND gle.voucher_type = 'Journal Entry'
              AND gle.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
              AND acc.is_group = 0
              AND acc.root_type IN ('Income', 'Expense')
            GROUP BY gle.voucher_no
        ) v ON v.voucher_no = g.voucher_no
        GROUP BY g.account, DATE_FORMAT(g.posting_date, '%%Y-%%m')
    ) AS month_tot
      ON month_tot.receivable_account = paid.receivable_account
     AND month_tot.ym = DATE_FORMAT(paid.payment_date, '%%Y-%%m')
    JOIN `tabAccount` acc_pl ON acc_pl.name = pl.account
    GROUP BY pl.account, acc_pl.account_name

) AS q
JOIN `tabAccount` acc ON acc.name = q.konto
GROUP BY q.konto, q.konto_name, `Kategorie:Data`
ORDER BY FIELD(`Kategorie:Data`, 'Einnahmen', 'Umlagefähig', 'Nicht umlagefähig'), q.konto_name;
